required_fields.description: The specific context or circumstances the user is in when the need arises.
required_fields.example: When we are preparing for a seasonal sale and need to segment our high-value customers...

required_fields.description: The underlying driver, pain point, or desire that pushes the user to seek a solution.
required_fields.example: I want to automate the export of live purchase data to our email marketing tool...

required_fields.description: The measurable success criteria or functional benefit the user hopes to achieve.
required_fields.example: So that we can send personalized offers in real-time without manual CSV uploads.

required_fields.description: How the user currently solves the problem or manages the pain point today.
required_fields.example: Currently, a junior analyst manually exports a report from the SQL database every Monday morning.
